Rules.InvariantScript:
Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Notes", Icon: Icon.Note, Screen: App.ActiveScreen}
)

ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People}
)
If(Self.Layout = Layout.Horizontal, Min(280, Self.Width - 60), Min(280, Self.Height - 60))

Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen}
)

Rules.InvariantScript:
Sort(
    Filter(
        colJobEntryOptionHierarchy,
        Type <> gblOptionSets.JobEntryOption.Type.Header And Type <> gblOptionSets.JobEntryOption.Type.Attribute
    ),
    RowNumber,
    SortOrder.Descending
)

If(
    !IsBlank(ThisItem.'Job Entry Option'),
    Set(
        gblRecordJobEntryOption_Hierarchy,
        ThisItem
    ),
    Set(
        gblRecordJobEntryOption_Hierarchy,
        LookUp(
            AddColumns(
                colCdsJobEntryOptions,
                RowNumber,
                ThisItem.RowNumber
            ),
            'Parent Option'.'Job Entry Option' = gblRecordJobEntryOption_Hierarchy.'Job Entry Option'
        )
    )
)

If(
    !IsBlank(
        LookUp(
            colCdsJobEntrySelections,
            'Job Entry Selection' = gblRecordJobEntrySelection.'Job Entry Selection',
            Notes
        )
    ),
    gblAppStyles.Status.Info,
    gblAppStyles.Status.Neutral
)

If(
    !IsBlank(
        LookUp(
            colCdsJobEntrySelections,
            'Job Entry Selection' = gblRecordJobEntrySelection.'Job Entry Selection',
            Notes
        )
    ),
    Icon.Post,
    Icon.Note
)

LookUp(
    colCdsJobEntryOptions,
    'Job Entry Option' = LookUp(
        colJobEntryOptionHierarchy,
        RowNumber = gal_Options_Selected.Selected.RowNumber,
        'Job Entry Option'
    )
)

Filter(
    colCdsJobEntryOptions,
    'Parent Option'.'Job Entry Option' = gblRecordJobEntryOption_Hierarchy.'Parent Option'.'Job Entry Option'
)
If(gal_Options_Selected.Selected.'Job Entry Option'=ThisItem.'Job Entry Option', gblAppStyles.Status.Neutral, gblAppStyles.Card.Fill)
If(!(gal_Options_Selected.Selected.'Job Entry Option'=ThisItem.'Job Entry Option'), gblAppStyles.Card.HoverFill)
